title: The Stars We Can No Longer See

scenes.text: Some stars have vanished from our night sky!
Astronomers have discovered stars that are no longer visible due to cosmic events.
These vanishings could be due to black holes or supernovae.
What does this mean for our understanding of the universe?
scenes.label: MYSTERIES OF THE UNIVERSE

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: Some stars are disappearing from our night sky due to cosmic events. What implications does this have for our knowledge of the universe? Follow for more cosmic revelations!
